name: P2000 | 致命红蝎
descriptionEn: Accurate and controllable, the German-made P2000 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents. It has been painted using anodized-effect paints in a rippled fade pattern with a red scorpion decal on the grip.
descriptionZh: 精准、可控，这把德国制造的耐用第一回合手枪非常适合对付那些没有穿护甲的对手。 这把武器使用涟漪渐变图案，握把配上红蝎贴花，通过电镀处理进行了涂装。
